props.name: intensity
props.description: Overall brightness multiplier applied after accumulation.

props.name: speed
props.description: Global time multiplier controlling ray motion & distortion.

props.name: colors
props.description: Optional array of hex colors used as a gradient (otherwise spectral)

props.name: distort
props.description: Amount of bend/distortion applied to marching space (adds organic wobble)

props.name: paused
props.description: Freeze time progression when true (animation stops)

props.name: hoverDampness
props.description: Smoothing factor (0-1) for pointer tracking when animationType='hover'

props.name: rayCount
props.description: If > 0 applies an angular comb filter to produce discrete ray spokes
